name: workspace-json
description: Portable codebase intelligence and behavioral risk checks for coding agents. Fragility and co-change history from workspace.json, enforced via deterministic pre-edit hooks with mechanically derived evidence tiers.

interface.shortDescription: Give Codex durable knowledge of codebase fragility and change patterns.
interface.longDescription: Read portable workspace.json evidence before supported edits, surface fragility and co-change context, and deterministically block evidenced partner omissions.
defaultPrompt: Review this proposed change using workspace.json evidence.
Show fragile files and their recorded co-change partners.
Assess these paths before I edit them.
